hero_sub: Top-rated nail and spa services in Durham
about: Amber nails & spa offers nail and spa treatments in Durham. Contact them at ambernailspa2268@gmail.com

faq.q: What area does Amber Nails & Spa serve?
faq.a: Amber Nails & Spa is based in Durham and welcomes clients from Durham and the surrounding local area

faq.q: How can I book an appointment?
faq.a: To book, email ambernailspa2268@gmail.com with your preferred date and service. The team will reply with available slots

faq.q: What can I expect when I visit?
faq.a: You can expect a clean, professional environment offering nail and spa treatments. The salon holds a 5‑star rating on Google from 45 reviews, reflecting consistent client satisfaction
